description: Create a scientific diagram of the MAPK/ERK signaling pathway in draw.io using the starter file at '~/Diagrams/mapk_pathway.drawio' and the specifications in '~/Desktop/pathway_requirements.txt'. The diagram must include the 10 signaling molecules (EGF, EGFR, GRB2, SOS, RAS, RAF, MEK, ERK, ELK1, MYC) connected by directed arrows to show signal flow, follow the required color-coding scheme, and include a legend. Save the diagram and export the final image as a PNG to '~/Diagrams/exports/mapk_pathway.png'.
